home.whoWeAreDesc: From pioneering automaker in Korea to global auto industry leader

about.title: About Hyundai
about.subtitle: From pioneering automaker in Korea to global auto industry leader
about.intro: We are dedicated to moving humanity forward, crafting vehicles that redefine mobility for our global community.
about.overviewBody: A big technological step forward is only meaningful when it is anchored in a deep sense of humanity. From hydrogen-powered solutions and next-generation electric vehicles to cutting-edge robotics and air mobility, we advance human progress through innovation. Progress for humanity is our guiding principle, uniting us in who we are, where we come from, and where we are going.
about.progressBody: We believe progress only becomes meaningful when connected with a deep sense of humanity. Humanity is what unites us and makes us stronger; it guides our investments and drives our innovations. We are here to do the right thing for humanity.
about.quote: If someone asks me what is the motivating force for Hyundai, I would have a ready answer: a desire for better.
about.quoteAuthor: — Chung Ju-yung, Founding Chairman of Hyundai Motor Group
about.cornerTitle: Inspired by What's Around the Corner
about.cornerBody: Today we stand at an amazing point in the evolution of mobility and the benefits it brings humanity. Transportation is becoming smarter, safer, more connected, and in harmony with sustainability and a zero-emission tomorrow — and we are at the forefront as a smart mobility solution provider.
about.nextBody: Progress needs new perspectives to move forward. Our transformation from an automobile manufacturer into a smart mobility solutions provider demonstrates this flexibility and vision — through autonomous driving, robotics, advanced air mobility, and AI- and big-data-based connectivity.
about.wayBody: Any great road trip needs the right traveling companions. That's why we look forward to taking these exciting next steps together with you, providing everyone with the mobility solutions they need to enhance their lives. That's progress for humanity.
about.progressQuote: We are here to do what benefits humanity.
about.historyIntro: From a pioneering Korean passenger car to a global auto leader — decades of innovation.

events: Opened Hyundai Motor Group Innovation Center (HMGICS) in Singapore
Launched IONIQ 5, the first model on the E-GMP platform
Launched the IONIQ brand dedicated to electric vehicles
Established Motional, an autonomous driving joint venture
Cumulative global sales surpassed 60 million vehicles
Ranked among the world's top automakers by volume
Recognized for major gains in vehicle quality rankings
Introduced the industry-leading 10-year / 100,000-mile warranty in the US
Entered the US market with the Excel
Launched the Hyundai Pony, Korea's first mass-produced passenger car

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you.
contact.fileHint: You can upload up to 2 files, limited to PDF, JPEG, or PNG formats only.
contact.marketingIntro: You must read and accept the personal information usage agreement before submitting an inquiry.
contact.consentRequired: I have read and agree to the personal information usage agreement.
contact.optOut: I do not wish to receive commercial information in the future from Hyundai or its official dealer network.
contact.privacyConsent: I agree that my personal information will be used in accordance with the privacy policy.
contact.successMsg: Thank you for reaching out. Your message has been received.
